name: io.github.tradeparadigm/mcp-paradigm-py
title: Paradigm DRFQv2
description: MCP server for the Paradigm trading platform. Covers DRFQv2 (bilateral RFQ) and FSPD (Future Spread Direct orderbook): RFQ lifecycle, orders, trades, orderbook, MMP, and the trade tape.

environmentVariables.name: PARADIGM_ACCESS_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer access key issued by Paradigm.

environmentVariables.name: PARADIGM_SIGNING_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Base64-encoded HMAC signing key issued by Paradigm.

environmentVariables.name: PARADIGM_ACCOUNT
environmentVariables.description: Optional account name for multi-desk firms (Paradigm-Account header).

environmentVariables.name: PARADIGM_FSPD_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional FSPD base URL override. Defaults to api.fs.prod.paradigm.co / api.fs.testnet.paradigm.co.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Port for streamable-http transport. Defaults to 3000.
